title: thelo #2309
definition:
1) to will, have in mind, intend
    1a) to be resolved or determined, to purpose
    1b) to desire, to wish
    1c) to love
        1c1) to like to do a thing, be fond of doing
    1d) to take delight in, have pleasure

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5915\\
